technology.title: Ad for AI editing app which said it could 'remove anything' banned
technology.summary: The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."

briefing.news_focus: The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."
briefing.news_focus_zh: The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."
briefing.background: 此議題通常涉及生成式 AI、模型能力競爭、算力供應，以及商業化與監管之間的平衡。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於誰能掌握模型能力、算力資源與商業應用場景，同時控制成本與政策風險。

technology.title: US messageboard 4Chan mocks £520,000 fine for UK online safety breaches
technology.summary: The fine includes £450,000 for lack of age checks to prevent children from seeing pornography.

briefing.news_focus: The fine includes £450,000 for lack of age checks to prevent children from seeing pornography.
briefing.news_focus_zh: The fine includes £450,000 for lack of age checks to prevent children from seeing pornography.
briefing.background: 科技監管議題通常圍繞反壟斷、資料治理、內容責任與跨境規則。
briefing.analysis: 主要角力在於創新自由、市場支配力限制，以及公共風險治理。

politics.title: Trump threatens to send ICE into airports unless funding deal reached
politics.summary: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.

briefing.news_focus: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.
briefing.news_focus_zh: The president said ICE would "do security" as airport security staff have gone without pay for weeks due to a partial government shutdown.
briefing.background: 安全與衝突議題通常牽涉軍事風險、外交回應、能源與市場連動效應。
briefing.analysis: 主要角力在於軍事升高風險、外交降溫空間與國際成本分攤。

politics.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
politics.summary: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

briefing.news_focus: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
briefing.background: 美中相關議題通常同時涉及戰略競爭、貿易規則、科技限制與區域安全。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於經濟互賴與戰略脫鉤之間如何重新劃界。

economy.title: US holds interest rates as Iran war triggers inflation fears
economy.summary: The US central bank is moving cautiously, despite pressure from the president to cut interest rates.

briefing.news_focus: The US central bank is moving cautiously, despite pressure from the president to cut interest rates.
briefing.news_focus_zh: The US central bank is moving cautiously, despite pressure from the president to cut interest rates.
briefing.background: 利率相關議題通常反映央行對通膨、成長與金融穩定之間的取捨。
briefing.analysis: 核心角力在於壓抑通膨、維持經濟活動與控制金融市場波動。

economy.title: A small US grocer is calling out the lower prices at big chains
economy.summary: It is 'impossible for us to compete', says the boss of a New York grocery store.

briefing.news_focus: It is 'impossible for us to compete', says the boss of a New York grocery store.
briefing.news_focus_zh: It is 'impossible for us to compete', says the boss of a New York grocery store.
briefing.background: 通膨新聞通常反映價格壓力、需求強弱、供應鏈變化與政策回應。
briefing.analysis: 主要角力在於成本轉嫁能力、實質購買力與政策調整節奏。
